title: Record spectacular header particle chrome contract
prompt: Create reports/header-particle-chrome.md with sections for Brand spectacle, Particle divider, Tiny collapse, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Header Particle Chrome Contract

## Brand spectacle
header brand mark uses spectacular animated text when ambient effects are on

## Particle divider
header fills remaining width with a live particle divider between brand and model

## Tiny collapse
header collapses on tiny/narrow terminals so it does not steal vertical space

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + header vitest + live TUI chrome render
